name: Invibes Advertising N.V.
summary: Invibes Advertising N.V., a technology company, provides digital advertising services. Its solutions are supported by an in-feed format that is integrated into media content. The company develops its technology to help brands to communicate with consumers. Its technology is optimized for distributing in a closed network of media sites, including Bertelsmann, Hearst, Unify, Groupe Marie Claire, Axel Springer, and others. The company was founded 2011 and is headquartered in Ghent, Belgium.
